key_finding: Cumulative V > cumulative text at ALL 10/10 positions (mean +0.055 R, largest +0.104 at 10%). First fair apples-to-apples comparison (same aggregation, same positions) confirms KV cache carries information beyond raw text tokens. Aggregation transforms single-position noise into strong signal (+0.609 R improvement). SURPRISE: single hidden states at arbitrary positions are WEAKER than cumulative text (-0.517 R), confirming answer information is distributed across positions, not concentrated. No early decodability gap (both reach threshold at 10%).
evidence_impact: MODERATE evidence FOR the hypothesis. The cumulative V advantage is small (+0.055) but universal (10/10 positions) and the comparison is now fair. The advantage could be explained by inherent richness of L35 V-vectors compared to input embeddings (35 layers of computation). The hidden-state weakness reveals that no single position carries the full answer — information is distributed. Statistical significance test and cross-model replication needed.
next_planned: Paired permutation test for cumV vs cumText to determine if +0.055 is statistically significant. Consider residualizing against problem numbers. Cross-model replication on Mistral.

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL: 8 angles. K spectral geometry uniform across heads. V spectral differentiates.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: COMPUTATION POSITIONS: V R=0.977, gap +0.206 over expr-embed (moderate-strong). CUMULATIVE KV PROBE: cum_V > cum_text at 10/10 positions (+0.055 mean, moderate). EARLY DECODABILITY: no gap (both immediate). BEHAVIORAL: paraphrase uninformative. Hidden states weaker than cumulative reps.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE for Phase 1 (4 families). Phase 2: 2 families for computation-position probing.
